fn_def_list.fn_code:
Symbol()
  { memset(this, 0, sizeof *this); }

Sized_symbol()
  { }

size_t operator()(const Symbol_location& loc) const
  { return reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(loc.object) ^ loc.offset ^ loc.shndx; }
